title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Devyani International - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Devyani International - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Devyani International is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Devyani International:
Devyani International is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Devyani International!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
